title: Zain Fathoni - Senior Software Engineer at BookThatApp
description: I'm Zain, a developer based in Yogyakarta, Indonesia. I previously spent six years in Singapore while working at Ninja Van. I love spending my spare time building user-centric products and giving talks in meetups and conferences. Besides sharing my open-source activities, I co-organize ReactJS Indonesia and Frontend Indonesia communities to help my fellow Indonesian developers learn.
